name: Sasol Limited
description: Sasol Limited is a global integrated chemicals and energy company headquartered in South Africa. The company leverages proprietary technologies and expertise to integrate sophisticated processes into world-scale operating facilities. Sasol safely and sustainably sources, produces, and markets a diverse range of high-quality products, including fuel components, chemical components, and various co-products such as diesel, petrol, polymers, and solvents. By advancing innovative chemical and energy solutions, Sasol aims to create long-term value for its stakeholders while contributing to a more sustainable planet, society, and enterprise.
